p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests p2p gates: test_repo_no_tabs (spaces not tabs), test_repo_trailing_newline (POSIX newline), test_repo_node_syntax_webapp_route (balanced braces + export check), test_repo_node_syntax_buildimage (balanced braces + TRIGGER_API_URL check). All use subprocess.run() with cat/tail/node commands.

validate.notes: Docker build succeeded. NOP test correctly fails with reward=0 (3 fail-to-pass tests fail on base commit). Gold test passes with reward=1 (8/8 tests pass after applying fix). Fixed solve.sh to use sed-based approach instead of git patch (patch format was corrupt due to heredoc issues). Rubric judge ICR=0 is expected since no agent has run on the base repo - the gold solution does contain correct config edits.
